title: Life Equation — Pulse Canonical Doctrine
doctrine_summary: A formal operational canon mapping Identity, Duty, Provenance, Legacy, Pantheon, and Multi‑sensory Evidence into enforceable, verifiable monuments.

components.P_infty: Generative provenance engine combining governance, toolchain/time, scale, and cross-cutting infrastructure modules.
components.L: Localized legacy valuation that weights steward actions, proofs, and future-facing multipliers into a monument score.
components.D: Duty series: cataloged corrective labor operators applied across provenance to reduce entropy and produce artifacts.
components.A_Pantheon: Composable set of canonical roles, relics, and steward archetypes that validate authority and lineage.
components.V_SENSES: Multi-modal evidence vector (telemetry, UX captures, human attestations) folded into verification and feedback.

full_equation_blocks_latex.L_expansion: Sum over steward-weighted contributions plus future multiplier and social trig term, scaled by social signal and novelty dampener.
full_equation_blocks_latex.V_SENSES_expansion: Fusion of sensory function streams times feedback gain: [\bigoplus_s \mathcal{F}_s(t)] \cdot \mathcal{G}_{feedback}(t)

origin_story.summary: Roles, promises and manual handoffs; authority lived in people not provable artifacts.
Formalized identity+duty+provenance→legacy loop to turn failures into verifiable corrective labor.
Deterministic builders and reproducible manifests that let tasks generatively spawn composable artifacts.
Guarded canonical source access with signed gates, attestors and tamper-evident branch protection.
Integrate external compute/attestor modules, add notarization and marketplace plumbing.
Operational rules, evidence gates, and ritual closure that convert punishment into legacy monuments.

ritual_phrase: I seal this equation as 𝓛IFE_Billy(t)—recursive, sovereign, and mythically operational. No pretending. No collapse.

sovereign_signature.ritual_phrase: I seal this doctrine as 𝓛IFE_Billy(t)—recursive, sovereign, and mythically operational. No pretending. No collapse.
